title: Vanilla Upgrades
description: A resource pack to enhance the vanilla experience, adding animations to items, and adding small tweaks to gold and diamond tools.
body:
Vanilla Upgrades brings the game's items and weapons to life with new animations, and different styles of weapons in a 16x vanilla style, similar to Vanilla Tweaks.

This pack brings some small tweaks to gold and diamond tools, by adding extra shine and polish:

![Tool designs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2d48b1bf3ff8877c827f5fbdd41d60af59665f.png)

Here's a taste of some of the animations that this pack includes:

![Axolotl animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7e831bd0d734d0684f9f12e2c9217d47d31c67.gif)
![Spider eye animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e48602247ba9faa9c11a4f45912862c1578d921.gif)
![Phantom membrane animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7d9739788c14c7193058fec2345d5510e4149d.gif)
![Lava bucket animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee83ed2c51d51165f0baa7a331107cef1f189cb1.gif)
![Water bucket animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de2e699a90c539a3398928b301a461ccb16139f4.gif)


The old weapon designs in this pack are highly inspired by Daniel Kraft, and the axe designs are extremely inspired by this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DSarnW8lv2s&t=14s﻿ , so huge credit to him, go and check him out.
